parameters.query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as today_count FROM gk_leads
WHERE sent_at >= CURRENT_DATE;

WITH inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO gk_leads (clinic_name, clinic_phone, place_id, lead_score, ads_group, google_rating, google_reviews, google_ads_count, status, is_homolog)
  VALUES (
    $gk${{ $json.out_clinic_name }}$gk$,
    '{{ $json.out_clinic_phone }}',
    $gk${{ $json.out_place_id }}$gk$,
    {{ $json.out_lead_score || 0 }},
    $gk${{ $json.out_ads_group }}$gk$,
    {{ $json.out_google_rating || 'NULL' }},
    {{ $json.out_google_reviews || 'NULL' }},
    {{ $json.out_google_ads_count || 'NULL' }},
    'created',
    {{ $('Supabase - Lê Config').first().json.environment === 'homolog' }}
  )
  ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
  RETURNING *
)
SELECT * FROM inserted
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM gk_leads
WHERE place_id = '{{ $json.out_place_id }}'
  AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM inserted)
LIMIT 1;

UPDATE gk_leads
SET status        = 'failed',
    error_message = 'not_on_whatsapp',
    updated_at    = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $("Lead Inserido?").first().json.id }}';

INSERT INTO gk_conversations (
  remote_jid, clinic_name, push_name, status,
  evolution_instance, message_count, last_message_at, is_homolog
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $("Seleciona Template").first().json.remote_jid }}',
  '{{ ($("Seleciona Template").first().json.clinic_name || "").replace(/\'/g, "''") }}',
  '',
  'greeting_sent',
  '{{ $env.EVOLUTION_INSTANCE_NAME }}',
  1,
  NOW(),
  {{ $('Supabase - Lê Config').first().json.environment === 'homolog' }}
)
ON CONFLICT (remote_jid) DO UPDATE SET
  status        = 'greeting_sent',
  clinic_name   = EXCLUDED.clinic_name,
  message_count = gk_conversations.message_count + 1,
  last_message_at = NOW(),
  updated_at    = NOW()
RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO gk_messages (conversation_id, direction, content, message_type)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.id }}',
  'outbound',
  $gk${{ $('Seleciona Template').first().json.greetingMessage }}$gk$,
  'text'
);

UPDATE gk_leads
SET sent_at = NOW(),
    conversation_id = '{{ $('Supabase - Cria Conversa').first().json.id }}',
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $('Seleciona Template').first().json.id }}';
SELECT environment, homolog_phone FROM sdr_config WHERE id = 1;
